headline: This Saturday, choose discipline over sabotage
summary: You need -0.58 kg/week but manage -0.39; today's Saturday choices determine if this week finally closes the gap.
details: Replace emotional snacking with Huel meals and pre-portioned foods—no improvisation today. Do 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill at moderate intensity. You're 161 days behind schedule; every Saturday you win now compounds toward your June 8th deadline and resets the weekend pattern that's been costing you.
